# Bespoke Auto Design

> Miami's premier XPEL-certified automotive protection studio specializing in Paint Protection Film, Ceramic Coating, Ceramic Window Tint, and Color Change Wraps for luxury and exotic vehicles.

## About

- Business: Bespoke Auto Design
- Address: 7943 NW 64th St, Miami, FL 33166
- Phone: (786) 395-9172
- Email: sales@bespokeauto.design
- Website: https://www.bespokeauto.design
- Owner: Alessandro
- Certifications: XPEL Authorized Dealer, XPEL-Certified Installers
- Service Areas: Miami, Brickell, Coral Gables, Bal Harbour, Key Biscayne, Sunny Isles, Coconut Grove, Aventura, Miami Beach, South Miami, Doral, Pinecrest

## Services

- XPEL Paint Protection Film (PPF) — starting at $1,499
- Ceramic Coating — starting at $599
- Ceramic Window Tint — starting at $150
- Color Change Wrap — starting at $2,500
- Marine Ceramic Coating

## Why Choose Us

- 7+ years experience, 500+ vehicles protected
- Climate-controlled installation facility
- Up to 10-year XPEL manufacturer warranty
- Specialists in exotic and luxury vehicles
- 5-star rated, currently booking 1-2 weeks out
